subcodes.first_line: All the world is illumined by the lights of the manifestation of the Most Great Name, yet some are aware whilst others remain veiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم بانوار ظهور اسم اعظم منور ولکن بعضی آگاه و برخی محتجب مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
